title: EsTable Column Configuration
description: Configuration for a single column in @es-plus/vue3 EsTable component

prop.description: Data field name in the row object

key.description: Alternative to prop. Column unique identifier (converted to prop internally)

fixed.description: Fix column to left or right side

formatter.description: Function (row) => string. Format cell display value

render.description: Custom render function (h, { row, value, index }) => VNode

scopedSlots.description: Named slot configuration for custom column rendering

customRender.description: Slot name to use for rendering this column

groups.description: Nested child columns for multi-level headers

ellipsis.description: Enable text overflow ellipsis with tooltip

btns.description: Row operation buttons (typically used in an 'actions' column)

clickEvent.description: Function (row) => void. Click handler receiving the row data

type.description: Special column type: selection checkbox, expand row, or row index

emptyPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for empty cell values
